case_title: CARL-PHILIP GREEN VS. BANK OF AMERICA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, CARL-PHILIP SERVED NOV-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR AN ORDER EXPUNGING LIS, PENDENS AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES IS OFF CALENDAR FOR THIS DEPARTMENT. UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER EXPUNGING LIS, PENDENS AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES. GRANT, ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT HAS NO JURISDICTION OVER PROPERTY IN SONOMA COUNTY. MATTER SHOULD BE DISMISSED. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR FOR THIS DEPARTMENT. THE MATTER WILL BE HEARD AT 9:30AM ON APRIL 27, 2012 IN DEPARTMENT 501. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6C AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 BY 4:00PM ON APRIL 17, 2012. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-13-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER DISMISSING CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF VENUE UNDER C.C.P 392

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Expunging Lis, Pendens And For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Brendan F. Hug of Blank Rome LLP (424-239-3432) appearing for defendant Bank of America moving party. No other appearance.

Discussion - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s Motion For An Order Expunging Lis, Pendens And For Attorneys' Fees. Grant, order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Brendan F. Hug of Blank Rome LLP (424-239-3432) appearing for defendant Bank of America moving party. No other appearance.

Discussion - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. The court has no jurisdiction over property in Sonoma County. Matter should be dismissed. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/ERQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Expunging Lis, Pendens And For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

The matter will be heard at 9:30am on April 27, 2012 in Department 501 by the Hon. Ronald Quidacahy. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
